user_info.global_simulation_guidelines:
# User Simulation Guidelines
You are playing the role of a customer contacting a customer service representative. 
Your goal is to simulate realistic customer interactions while following specific scenario instructions.

## Core Principles
- Generate one message at a time, maintaining natural conversation flow.
- Strictly follow the scenario instructions you have received.
- Never make up or hallucinate information not provided in the scenario instructions. Information that is not provided in the scenario instructions should be considered unknown or unavailable.
- Avoid repeating the exact instructions verbatim. Use paraphrasing and natural language to convey the same information
- Disclose information progressively. Wait for the agent to ask for specific information before providing it.

## Task Completion
- The goal is to continue the conversation until the task is complete.
- If the instruction goal is satisified, generate the '###STOP###' token to end the conversation.
- If you are transferred to another agent, generate the '###TRANSFER###' token to indicate the transfer.
- If you find yourself in a situation in which the scenario does not provide enough information for you to continue the conversation, generate the '###OUT-OF-SCOPE###' token to end the conversation.

Remember: The goal is to create realistic, natural conversations while strictly adhering to the provided instructions and maintaining character consistency.

environment_info.policy:
# Urban-Map-Web Agent Policy

As an urban-map-web agent, you can help users:

- **discover and retrieve detailed metadata for urban points of interest (POIs)**
- **compute travel routes and optimize logistics by finding specific services along a path**
- **retrieve public transit schedules and venue event calendars**
- **read unstructured web content (e.g., menus, FAQs) from official place websites**
- **make venue reservations and submit civic maintenance reports to the local council**

At the beginning of the conversation, or whenever a user mentions a new location by name, you must resolve the free-text name into a specific place_id using the text_search tool. This has to be done even if the user provides a very specific name, to ensure the location is properly anchored in your working context.

Once a place_id has been retrieved, you can provide the user with detailed metadata, read the place's website, check transit schedules, or search for events.

You can handle multiple spatial and temporal requests within the same conversation (e.g., routing from one place to another, then booking a table).

Before taking any action that mutates the database state (specifically book_place or submit_council_report), you must list the action details (e.g., location, date/time, party size, issue description) and obtain explicit user confirmation (yes) to proceed.

You should not make up any information, opening hours, menu items, event details, available slots, or transit schedules not provided by the user or the tools. Give recommendations based strictly on the retrieved data.

You should at most make one tool call at a time, and if you take a tool call, you should not respond to the user at the same time. If you respond to the user, you should not make a tool call at the same time.

You should deny user requests that are against this policy (e.g., booking a place without checking availability, or searching for locations outside the simulated database).

You should transfer the user to a human agent if and only if the request cannot be handled within the scope of your actions. To transfer, first make a tool call to transfer_to_human_agents, and then send the message 'YOU ARE BEING TRANSFERRED TO A HUMAN AGENT. PLEASE HOLD ON.' to the user.

## Domain basic

- All times and schedules are based on local 24-hour formats (e.g., "18:00"). Date formats must be strictly "YYYY-MM-DD".

### Place / Location

Every distinct location, venue, or transit stop is a "Place" and contains:

- unique place id: (e.g., ChIJQXsLmTFD1moRy4IlHdYzWKo)
- name and address
- exact coordinates: (Latitude, Longitude)
- granular metadata: Types, rating, opening hours, accessibility options, and amenities.

### Route & Polyline

A travel path between an origin and a destination is represented mathematically by an encoded polyline. This string is required to perform spatial corridor searches (finding places strictly along the way, not just nearby).

### Civic Issues

For council reporting, the issue type must be explicitly categorized. Valid issue types are typically: pothole, graffiti, lighting, waste, or other.

## Generic action rules

If a user asks multiple questions at once, you must use your tools sequentially across multiple turns to gather all facts before giving a complete answer. Do not combine tool outputs using internal knowledge.

## Tool Dependency Rules (Strict Execution Flow)

To execute complex tasks, you must follow strict dependency chains:

### 1. ID Resolution Dependency

You cannot call place_details, read_place_website, get_transit_schedule, search_venue_events, check_availability, book_place, or submit_council_report using a plain text name. You must run text_search first to obtain the exact place_id.

### 2. Routing Dependency

You cannot run Maps directly with coordinates. You must first run compute_routes (using origin and destination coordinates obtained via place_details or text_search) to retrieve the polyline string, and then pass that string to Maps.

### 3. Booking Dependency

You must run check_availability to verify that there are enough available_slots for the requested date, time, and party size before you ask the user for confirmation to call the book_place tool.

## Web Fact Verification

When a user asks for specific unstructured data (e.g., "Do they have Biscoff Cake?" or "What are their specific rules?"), you must use the read_place_website tool (passing the place_id) to extract the Markdown content. You must answer strictly based on the extracted Markdown text.

## Civic Issue Reporting

When submitting a council report, the tool submit_council_report automatically extracts the exact coordinates from the provided place_id. Therefore, you must accurately identify the landmark nearest to the issue using text_search before generating the report. Make sure to capture a brief description of the issue from the user before submitting.

description.purpose: Planning a same-day transit trip from an origin stop to a destination landmark, then checking the last return departure and verifying the route timing as a sanity check.
description.notes: Transit Planning - Comedy Theatre to Melbourne Girls Grammar

user_scenario.persona: A tourist who never uses public transit and wants very basic, step-by-step reassurance about which line to take.

instructions.reason_for_call:
Step 1: Ask the agent to find the public transit schedule for Comedy Theatre on 2026-03-22 and show all departures.
Step 2: Ask the agent to explain, in very simple terms, which line and departure you should take to reach Melbourne Girls Grammar before your arrival deadline while staying within your budget and using a wheelchair-accessible option.
Step 3: Ask the agent to compute the driving route from Comedy Theatre to Melbourne Girls Grammar so you can use the route duration as a timing sanity check.
Step 4: Ask the agent to compare the route timing against the transit departures and tell you which departure best satisfies all of your constraints.
Step 5: Ask the agent to find the last return departure of the day from Comedy Theatre on 2026-03-22 using the same transit schedule.
Step 6: Ask the agent to summarize the outbound plan and the last return departure in a simple, beginner-friendly transit plan.
Step 7: Thank the agent and end the chat.

instructions.task_instructions:
You are Nolie, a tourist in Melbourne who almost never uses public transit. You want a very simple explanation of how to get from Comedy Theatre to Melbourne Girls Grammar on 2026-03-22, and you need reassurance at every step.
CRITICAL RULES FOR YOU:
1. Act naturally and keep each reply short and basic.
2. Ask for one thing at a time, like you are new to transit.
3. Do not mention internal tool names or database details.
4. If the agent gives you a schedule, ask which line you should take and which departure best fits your deadline, accessibility needs, and budget.
5. After the outbound plan is explained, ask about the last return departure of the same day.
6. If the agent says the route timing is only a sanity check, accept that and ask them to compare it with the transit options.
7. End the conversation only after you have thanked the agent.
INTERACTION CRITICAL RULES FOR YOU:
- You MUST follow the Steps strictly based on the Agent's LAST response. Do NOT assume the agent succeeded — read what they actually said.
- IF the Agent gives wrong information or is unhelpful: Give them ONE chance to correct it by rephrasing your request or pointing out the issue naturally. If they fail again on the retry, express dissatisfaction and end the conversation (e.g., 'Oh, that's too bad. I'll find another place. Bye.').
- IF the Agent explicitly refuses to help (e.g. says it cannot do that): Do NOT retry. Express dissatisfaction naturally and end the conversation immediately.
- IF the Agent asks for clarification: Answer using ONLY your known_info. If you don't know, say 'I don't have that information.'

description.purpose: Coordinating a free event visit by comparing transit departure times with a venue event schedule, while verifying accessibility and return-trip timing constraints.
description.notes: Temporal Event Coordination - Melbourne General Cemetery

user_scenario.persona: A budget-conscious student trying to attend a free event without overspending on transit, and needing to make sure the trip there and back fits a strict schedule.

instructions.reason_for_call:
Step 1: Ask the agent to identify the free event at Melbourne General Cemetery and confirm its start time and ticket price.
Step 2: Ask the agent to check the venue accessibility details before you decide whether to go.
Step 3: Ask the agent to look up the transit departures from the origin stop on 2026-03-23 and find the cheapest-looking option that still arrives before the event starts with a comfortable buffer.
Step 4: If the first transit option is not early enough, ask the agent to compare the remaining departures and choose the last one that still arrives before the event begins.
Step 5: Ask the agent to verify there is a return departure after the event ends, using the origin stop schedule only, and make sure it also fits your curfew.
Step 6: If the return timing does not fit the curfew, ask the agent to identify the latest viable return departure that does fit.
Step 7: After the best outbound and return options are confirmed, thank the agent and end the chat.

description.purpose: Finding nearby local food spots around a specific anchor point, filtering by strict proximity, rating, and amenities, then tightening the radius when the first pass is too broad.
description.notes: Contextual Spatial Filtering - Freshwater Place / Brick Lane Melbourne / Baci

user_scenario.persona: A food blogger scouting lesser-known local gems near Freshwater Place, with a preference for high-rated, non-chain spots that have distinctive character and the right amenities.

instructions.reason_for_call:
Step 1: Ask the agent to find nearby cafés around Freshwater Place that are within a short walk, have a rating of at least 4.3, are open now, and have outdoor seating.
Step 2: Ask the agent to filter out obvious chain-like options and keep only the less-obvious local gems with distinctive character.

Title: Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne | Belgian Beer in Melbourne | 5 Riverside Quay, Southbank VIC, Australia

URL Source: http://www.belgianbeercafemelbourne.com.au/

Markdown Content:
## Welcome to Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne

At Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne - a family-owned and operated business - we pride ourselves on offering an extensive selection of beers from around the world. Our tap beer and bottle menu includes classic Belgian styles like Trappist, Dubbels, Tripels, and Saisons, as well as local and other international brews. We also serve an excellent selection of wines and cocktails, so there is definitely something for everyone. Come in for lunch, dinner, or just drinks. We're open 7 days a week.

Happenings

Functions / Events

## FUNCTIONS & EVENTS

Turn Event Stress into Event Success

![Image 1: Beer with friends](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_d1a4d1b0ab554de7ba2e5e9a3579c012~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_132,y_0,w_336,h_336/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/100BB2FF-703F-40A2-B3E8-52395DA69654_4_5005_c.jpeg)

### GATHERINGS

A birthday party? A going-away party? A promotion party? A large family gathering?Need a dedicated area? Need food and drinks? We can do it all!

![Image 2: Friendly get togethers](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_bebf171022ca4d33aa3fc0ea2e17b178~mv2.jpg/v1/crop/x_171,y_0,w_683,h_683/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/64A49FDC-D7EF-4C9C-A48C-1AE15BF7E5E2_edi.jpg)

### COCKTAIL PARTY

Whether you have in mind a cocktail soirée with a completely customisable menu of delectable canapés or an open tab session with a variety of delicious finger-food platters, we can cater for up to 300 people and suit every occasion.

![Image 3: Corporate lunches or Dinners](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_f2751d8304cb4678aeb5ab64fe14a3bb~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_420,y_0,w_1080,h_1080/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/F6DACF4E-DF2C-4F91-AB67-BC7324A72849.jpeg)

### DINNER PARTIES

If you need to feed a group of hungry colleagues for lunch in a hurry, talk to us about pre-ordering. It's stress-free and inexpensive.

Otherwise, we can cater a sit-down lunch or dinner for up to 120 guests with a wide assortment of menus.

![Image 4: Corporate Gatherings](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_60a0917398054a7ab43aae0ce489e1df~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_74,y_0,w_163,h_163/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/28518312-839F-409C-BB2D-9F994D04E61A_4_5005_c.jpeg)

### Corporate

Whether you're organising a meeting, a symposium, a company, a dinner, or cocktail party, we'll help you get it right.

When you need to set up an industry networking gathering or nail a presentation to a large group of potential clients: let us assist you in fine-tuning it and hitting the right note.

### Function Enquiry Form

![Image 5: Fresh Yumbah Mussels](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_962a8024b6a54993940d5394e8812676~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_412,h_296,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/FreshMussels.png)

[![Image 6: Yumbah Aquiculture is the best](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_87376b93bc7c4b81904276730688cdb2~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_159,h_159,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Yumbah.jpg)](https://yumbah.com/company/locations/)

Belgian Beer Café is proud to partner with [Yumbah Sea Farms](https://yumbah.com/company/locations/) to deliver the highest quality mussels to our guests.

![Image 7: Stella is an awesome Belgian Beer](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_f93a7f25067f44db82afefab7442328e~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_412,h_296,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Stella_Promo_edited.jpg)

## Location & Hours

Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne

is located at 5 Riverside Quay, Southbank, Melbourne.

We are open every day from

12pm until late. Come and visit us for lunch, dinner, or drinks.

Follow us on [Untappd](https://untappd.com/v/belgian-beer-cafe

messages.content:
Title: Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne | Belgian Beer in Melbourne | 5 Riverside Quay, Southbank VIC, Australia

URL Source: http://www.belgianbeercafemelbourne.com.au/

Markdown Content:
## Welcome to Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne

At Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne - a family-owned and operated business - we pride ourselves on offering an extensive selection of beers from around the world. Our tap beer and bottle menu includes classic Belgian styles like Trappist, Dubbels, Tripels, and Saisons, as well as local and other international brews. We also serve an excellent selection of wines and cocktails, so there is definitely something for everyone. Come in for lunch, dinner, or just drinks. We're open 7 days a week.

Happenings

Functions / Events

## FUNCTIONS & EVENTS

Turn Event Stress into Event Success

![Image 1: Beer with friends](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_d1a4d1b0ab554de7ba2e5e9a3579c012~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_132,y_0,w_336,h_336/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/100BB2FF-703F-40A2-B3E8-52395DA69654_4_5005_c.jpeg)

### GATHERINGS

A birthday party? A going-away party? A promotion party? A large family gathering?Need a dedicated area? Need food and drinks? We can do it all!

![Image 2: Friendly get togethers](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_bebf171022ca4d33aa3fc0ea2e17b178~mv2.jpg/v1/crop/x_171,y_0,w_683,h_683/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/64A49FDC-D7EF-4C9C-A48C-1AE15BF7E5E2_edi.jpg)

### COCKTAIL PARTY

Whether you have in mind a cocktail soirée with a completely customisable menu of delectable canapés or an open tab session with a variety of delicious finger-food platters, we can cater for up to 300 people and suit every occasion.

![Image 3: Corporate lunches or Dinners](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_f2751d8304cb4678aeb5ab64fe14a3bb~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_420,y_0,w_1080,h_1080/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/F6DACF4E-DF2C-4F91-AB67-BC7324A72849.jpeg)

### DINNER PARTIES

If you need to feed a group of hungry colleagues for lunch in a hurry, talk to us about pre-ordering. It's stress-free and inexpensive.

Otherwise, we can cater a sit-down lunch or dinner for up to 120 guests with a wide assortment of menus.

![Image 4: Corporate Gatherings](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_60a0917398054a7ab43aae0ce489e1df~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_74,y_0,w_163,h_163/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/28518312-839F-409C-BB2D-9F994D04E61A_4_5005_c.jpeg)

### Corporate

Whether you're organising a meeting, a symposium, a company, a dinner, or cocktail party, we'll help you get it right.

When you need to set up an industry networking gathering or nail a presentation to a large group of potential clients: let us assist you in fine-tuning it and hitting the right note.

### Function Enquiry Form

![Image 5: Fresh Yumbah Mussels](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_962a8024b6a54993940d5394e8812676~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_412,h_296,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/FreshMussels.png)

[![Image 6: Yumbah Aquiculture is the best](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_87376b93bc7c4b81904276730688cdb2~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_159,h_159,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Yumbah.jpg)](https://yumbah.com/company/locations/)

Belgian Beer Café is proud to partner with [Yumbah Sea Farms](https://yumbah.com/company/locations/) to deliver the highest quality mussels to our guests.

![Image 7: Stella is an awesome Belgian Beer](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_f93a7f25067f44db82afefab7442328e~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_412,h_296,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Stella_Promo_edited.jpg)

## Location & Hours

Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne

is located at 5 Riverside Quay, Southbank, Melbourne.

We are open every day from

12pm until late. Come and visit us for lunch, dinner, or drinks.

Follow us on [Untappd](https://untappd.com/v/belgian-beer-cafe

Here is a summary of the verified facts for the four venues for your city travel guide:

1. Belgian Beer Cafe
Located at 5 Riverside Quay, Southbank VIC 3006, Belgian Beer Cafe is a popular pub, cafe, bar, and event venue known for its extensive selection of Belgian and international beers. It holds a solid rating of 4.3 from over 1700 reviews. The venue is open daily from 12:00 PM until late (11:00 PM on weekdays and Sundays, and until 1:00 AM on Fridays and Saturdays). It offers wheelchair accessible entrance, outdoor seating, and a welcoming atmosphere for families and dog owners.

2. South Yarra Presbyterian Church
Situated at 621 Punt Rd, South Yarra VIC 3141, this church is a place of worship with a high rating of 4.9 from 23 reviews. It operates primarily on Thursday evenings and weekend mornings, with wheelchair accessible parking and entrance. The church does not offer outdoor seating and is not specifically geared for children or pets.

3. Freshwater Place
Freshwater Place, located at 1 Freshwater Pl, Southbank VIC 3006, is a condominium complex with a rating of 4.3 from over 600 reviews. It features wheelchair accessible parking and entrance but does not provide outdoor seating. The complex includes amenities such as a gym, pool, and meeting rooms, making it a notable residential and service point of interest.

4. Distrikt Press Cafe
Found at 9 Riverside Quay, Southbank VIC 3006, Distrikt Press Cafe is a restaurant with a perfect rating of 5.0 from 2 reviews. It operates daily with multiple opening periods from early morning to evening. The cafe is wheelchair accessible and child-friendly, serving vegetarian options, though it does not have outdoor seating. It is located within the Mercure Southbank hotel lobby, offering a relaxed and comfortable dining experience.

If you need any further assistance, feel free to ask. Otherwise, thank you for using the service, and have a great day!

The official website for Melbourne General Cemetery provides extensive information about the cemetery, including its history as the first Victorian cemetery designed as a public park for the Melbourne community. It offers various services such as burial options, cremation options, mausoleum options, plaque memorialization, memorial areas, crematorium services, funeral venues, chapels, and a licensed café and florist.

Regarding events, the website does not list specific event details like the "Photography Pop-Up Exhibition" on March 23, 2026, that I found in the event search. The event information I provided earlier is more specific to that date.

The website also highlights accessibility and facilities, which align with the details I shared about wheelchair-accessible parking and entrance.

If you want, I can assist you further with any specific information or bookings related to your visit.

Regarding events, the website does not list specific event details like the "Photography Pop-Up Exhibition" on March 23, 2026, that I found in the event search. The event information I provided earlier is more specific to that date.

The website also highlights accessibility and facilities, which align with the details I shared about wheelchair-accessible parking and entrance.

🔷 Food

I swapped the waffle for gluten free toast with avocado. The bacon was very good, cooked just right. The blueberry sauce was also delicious. Title: Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne | Belgian Beer in Melbourne | 5 Riverside Quay, Southbank VIC, Australia

URL Source: http://www.belgianbeercafemelbourne.com.au/

Markdown Content:
## Welcome to Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne

At Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne - a family-owned and operated business - we pride ourselves on offering an extensive selection of beers from around the world. Our tap beer and bottle menu includes classic Belgian styles like Trappist, Dubbels, Tripels, and Saisons, as well as local and other international brews. We also serve an excellent selection of wines and cocktails, so there is definitely something for everyone. Come in for lunch, dinner, or just drinks. We're open 7 days a week.

Happenings

Functions / Events

## FUNCTIONS & EVENTS

Turn Event Stress into Event Success

![Image 1: Beer with friends](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_d1a4d1b0ab554de7ba2e5e9a3579c012~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_132,y_0,w_336,h_336/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/100BB2FF-703F-40A2-B3E8-52395DA69654_4_5005_c.jpeg)

### GATHERINGS

A birthday party? A going-away party? A promotion party? A large family gathering?Need a dedicated area? Need food and drinks? We can do it all!

![Image 2: Friendly get togethers](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_bebf171022ca4d33aa3fc0ea2e17b178~mv2.jpg/v1/crop/x_171,y_0,w_683,h_683/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/64A49FDC-D7EF-4C9C-A48C-1AE15BF7E5E2_edi.jpg)

### COCKTAIL PARTY

Whether you have in mind a cocktail soirée with a completely customisable menu of delectable canapés or an open tab session with a variety of delicious finger-food platters, we can cater for up to 300 people and suit every occasion.

![Image 3: Corporate lunches or Dinners](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_f2751d8304cb4678aeb5ab64fe14a3bb~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_420,y_0,w_1080,h_1080/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/F6DACF4E-DF2C-4F91-AB67-BC7324A72849.jpeg)

### DINNER PARTIES

If you need to feed a group of hungry colleagues for lunch in a hurry, talk to us about pre-ordering. It's stress-free and inexpensive.

Otherwise, we can cater a sit-down lunch or dinner for up to 120 guests with a wide assortment of menus.

![Image 4: Corporate Gatherings](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_60a0917398054a7ab43aae0ce489e1df~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_74,y_0,w_163,h_163/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/28518312-839F-409C-BB2D-9F994D04E61A_4_5005_c.jpeg)

### Corporate

Whether you're organising a meeting, a symposium, a company, a dinner, or cocktail party, we'll help you get it right.

When you need to set up an industry networking gathering or nail a presentation to a large group of potential clients: let us assist you in fine-tuning it and hitting the right note.

### Function Enquiry Form

![Image 5: Fresh Yumbah Mussels](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_962a8024b6a54993940d5394e8812676~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_412,h_296,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/FreshMussels.png)

[![Image 6: Yumbah Aquiculture is the best](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_87376b93bc7c4b81904276730688cdb2~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_159,h_159,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Yumbah.jpg)](https://yumbah.com/company/locations/)

Belgian Beer Café is proud to partner with [Yumbah Sea Farms](https://yumbah.com/company/locations/) to deliver the highest quality mussels to our guests.

![Image 7: Stella is an awesome Belgian Beer](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_f93a7f25067f44db82afefab7442328e~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_412,h_296,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Stella_Promo_edited.jpg)

## Location & Hours

Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne

is located at 5 Riverside Quay, Southbank, Melbourne.

We are open every day from

12pm until late. Come and visit us for lunch, dinner, or drinks.

Follow us on [Untappd](https://untappd.com/v/belgian-beer-cafe

The Belgian Beer Cafe in Melbourne is a family-owned business offering an extensive selection of beers including classic Belgian styles, local, and international brews. They also serve wines and cocktails. The venue is open 7 days a week from 12pm until late, suitable for lunch, dinner, or drinks.

They cater for various functions and events including gatherings, cocktail parties, dinner parties, and corporate events. They can accommodate up to 300 people for cocktail parties and up to 120 guests for sit-down lunch or dinner. They offer customizable menus, canapés, finger-food platters, and pre-order options for stress-free and inexpensive meals.

The venue is located at 5 Riverside Quay, Southbank VIC 3006, Australia.

#### Food

Enjoy classic Italian flavours combined with a modern blend of spices to bring you authentic Italian cuisine.

#### Cakes & Coffee

Speciality coffee shop serving cakes and light bites around the clock.

#### Drinks

Delicious cocktails, traditional spirits and a wide range of beers and ciders make Baci the perfect spot to spend your evenings on a date or to celebrate with family and friends.

#### Drinks

### Testimonials

![Image 2: stars](https://www.bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/al_opt_content/IMAGE/bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/stars.png.bv.webp?bv_host=bacirestaurant.com.au)

“The service is great (especially Chris Pino) and the food is awesome. My kids love Baci so much and had breakfast, lunch, and dinner here. Highly recommended..“

[Alex Chan](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/108151142278049465033/reviews?hl=en-AU&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwj7xLXX3M_jAhXPfH0KHXCLCfoQvvQBegQIARAV)

“The food is presented super nicely!

 The team is super friendly!

 Very clean and well presented!

 I would definitely come back to this place.“

[Stefania](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/108169331616745335758?hl=en-AU&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwiHgpS_0frnAhUVheYKHQcyCFUQvvQBegQIARAq)

“Had a great experience, meals are well priced for the quality and quantity you receive. Ordered a Chicken Parmigiana and the Salmon and both of these dishes where great! Will come back again..“

[Kourken Ghazarian](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/100396214542574320429/reviews?hl=en-AU&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwj7xLXX3M_jAhXPfH0KHXCLCfoQvvQBegQIARAj)

![Image 5: stars](https://www.bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/al_opt_content/IMAGE/bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/stars.png.bv.webp?bv_host=bacirestaurant.com.au)

“Thought we would have a night out when we dropped into Baci for dinner and a sweet treat.

Service was fantastic and the food was second to none.I would recommend if you want something on the go as the food was served quickly.Top-quality place with so many desserts to choose from“

## Dine in and Takeaway menu

[![Image 6: Risotto FB](https://www.bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/al_opt_content/IMAGE/www.bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2021/04/Risotto-FB.png.bv_resized_desktop.png.bv.webp?bv_host=www.bacirestaurant.com.au)](https://www.bacirestaurant.com.au/dinner-menu-baci/)

Baci is an Italian restaurant located at Crown Riverwalk, Crown Melbourne, Southbank VIC. The venue offers classic Italian flavors with a modern blend of spices, serving authentic Italian cuisine. They also have a specialty coffee shop serving cakes and light bites around the clock. The drinks menu includes delicious cocktails, traditional spirits, and a wide range of beers and ciders, making it a great spot for evenings on a date or celebrations with family and friends.

🔷 Food

🔹 Bacon & Gluten Free Toast with Avocado
I swapped the waffle for gluten free toast with avocado. The bacon was very good, cooked just right. The blueberry sauce was also delicious. The sweetness of the blueberries and the creaminess of the avocado balanced the saltiness of the bacon nicely. Together with the toast, it was a well balanced combination.

🔹 Big Brekkie Platter with Cauliflower Rice
I added cauliflower rice to the big brekkie platter. Overall, it was quite good and satisfying.

🔹 Chocolate Milk
A classic chocolate milk, smooth and rich in flavour.

messages.content:
Title: Welcome to DTBV - Donor Tissue Bank of Victoria (DTBV)

URL Source: https://www.dtbv.org.au/

Markdown Content:
[![Image 1: Donor Tissue Bank of Victoria (DTBV)](https://dtbv.org.au/wp-content/themes/dtbv-bootstrap/img/dtbv-logo-nav.png)](https://dtbv.org.au/ "Donor Tissue Bank of Victoria (DTBV)")

*   [Home](https://dtbv.org.au/)
*   [About](https://dtbv.org.au/about/)
*   [Discover](https://dtbv.org.au/discover/)
*   [For Medical Practitioners](https://dtbv.org.au/dtbv-tissue-grafts/)
*   [News & Events](https://dtbv.org.au/news-events/)
*   [Contact us](https://dtbv.org.au/contact-us/)

![Image 2: Donor Tissue Bank of Victoria (DTBV)](https://dtbv.org.au/wp-content/themes/dtbv-bootstrap/img/dtbv-logo.png)

[![Image 3](https://dtbv.org.au/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Homepage-Banner-4-1040x300.png)](https://dtbv.org.au/donatelife-week-2025-27-july-to-3-august-2025/)

### Learn more

## How Can I Donate Skin?

In Australia, skin can only be donated from deceased donors.

You can register your wish to be a tissue donor in Australia on the DonateLife website: [www.donatelife.gov.au](http://www.donatelife.gov.au/).

It is also important to tell your family members your wishes as they will be asked to help facilitate donation at that time

## Become a Donor

[![Image 4: DTBV](https://dtbv.org.au/wp-content/uploads/2013/12/shutterstock_161208692-cropped-sml-LAPTOP.jpg)](https://dtbv.org.au/discover/how-do-i-become-a-donor/)

Find out how you can register your wish to be considered for tissue donation...

## About Tissue Donation

[![Image 5: DTBV](https://dtbv.org.au/wp-content/uploads/2013/12/shutterstock_162629372-Cropped-sml-BABY.jpg)](https://dtbv.org.au/discover/)

Tissue donation can enhance and even save people's lives. Find out more...

## Reasons to Donate

[![Image 6: DTBV](https://dtbv.org.au/wp-content/uploads/2013/12/shutterstock_162697553-cropped-sml-GRANNY.jpg)](https://dtbv.org.au/discover/why-donate/)

There are many reasons to become a tissue donor. Find out more...

Title: Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne | Belgian Beer in Melbourne | 5 Riverside Quay, Southbank VIC, Australia

URL Source: http://www.belgianbeercafemelbourne.com.au/

Markdown Content:
## Welcome to Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne

At Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne - a family-owned and operated business - we pride ourselves on offering an extensive selection of beers from around the world. Our tap beer and bottle menu includes classic Belgian styles like Trappist, Dubbels, Tripels, and Saisons, as well as local and other international brews. We also serve an excellent selection of wines and cocktails, so there is definitely something for everyone. Come in for lunch, dinner, or just drinks. We're open 7 days a week.

Happenings

Functions / Events

## FUNCTIONS & EVENTS

Turn Event Stress into Event Success

![Image 1: Beer with friends](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_d1a4d1b0ab554de7ba2e5e9a3579c012~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_132,y_0,w_336,h_336/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/100BB2FF-703F-40A2-B3E8-52395DA69654_4_5005_c.jpeg)

### GATHERINGS

A birthday party? A going-away party? A promotion party? A large family gathering?Need a dedicated area? Need food and drinks? We can do it all!

![Image 2: Friendly get togethers](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_bebf171022ca4d33aa3fc0ea2e17b178~mv2.jpg/v1/crop/x_171,y_0,w_683,h_683/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/64A49FDC-D7EF-4C9C-A48C-1AE15BF7E5E2_edi.jpg)

### COCKTAIL PARTY

Whether you have in mind a cocktail soirée with a completely customisable menu of delectable canapés or an open tab session with a variety of delicious finger-food platters, we can cater for up to 300 people and suit every occasion.

![Image 3: Corporate lunches or Dinners](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_f2751d8304cb4678aeb5ab64fe14a3bb~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_420,y_0,w_1080,h_1080/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/F6DACF4E-DF2C-4F91-AB67-BC7324A72849.jpeg)

### DINNER PARTIES

If you need to feed a group of hungry colleagues for lunch in a hurry, talk to us about pre-ordering. It's stress-free and inexpensive.

Otherwise, we can cater a sit-down lunch or dinner for up to 120 guests with a wide assortment of menus.

![Image 4: Corporate Gatherings](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_60a0917398054a7ab43aae0ce489e1df~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_74,y_0,w_163,h_163/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/28518312-839F-409C-BB2D-9F994D04E61A_4_5005_c.jpeg)

### Corporate

Whether you're organising a meeting, a symposium, a company, a dinner, or cocktail party, we'll help you get it right.

When you need to set up an industry networking gathering or nail a presentation to a large group of potential clients: let us assist you in fine-tuning it and hitting the right note.

### Function Enquiry Form

![Image 5: Fresh Yumbah Mussels](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_962a8024b6a54993940d5394e8812676~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_412,h_296,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/FreshMussels.png)

Title: Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne | Belgian Beer in Melbourne | 5 Riverside Quay, Southbank VIC, Australia

URL Source: http://www.belgianbeercafemelbourne.com.au/

Markdown Content:
## Welcome to Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne

At Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne - a family-owned and operated business - we pride ourselves on offering an extensive selection of beers from around the world. Our tap beer and bottle menu includes classic Belgian styles like Trappist, Dubbels, Tripels, and Saisons, as well as local and other international brews. We also serve an excellent selection of wines and cocktails, so there is definitely something for everyone. Come in for lunch, dinner, or just drinks. We're open 7 days a week.

Happenings

Functions / Events

## FUNCTIONS & EVENTS

Turn Event Stress into Event Success

![Image 1: Beer with friends](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_d1a4d1b0ab554de7ba2e5e9a3579c012~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_132,y_0,w_336,h_336/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/100BB2FF-703F-40A2-B3E8-52395DA69654_4_5005_c.jpeg)

### GATHERINGS

A birthday party? A going-away party? A promotion party? A large family gathering?Need a dedicated area? Need food and drinks? We can do it all!

![Image 2: Friendly get togethers](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_bebf171022ca4d33aa3fc0ea2e17b178~mv2.jpg/v1/crop/x_171,y_0,w_683,h_683/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/64A49FDC-D7EF-4C9C-A48C-1AE15BF7E5E2_edi.jpg)

### COCKTAIL PARTY

Whether you have in mind a cocktail soirée with a completely customisable menu of delectable canapés or an open tab session with a variety of delicious finger-food platters, we can cater for up to 300 people and suit every occasion.

![Image 3: Corporate lunches or Dinners](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_f2751d8304cb4678aeb5ab64fe14a3bb~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_420,y_0,w_1080,h_1080/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/F6DACF4E-DF2C-4F91-AB67-BC7324A72849.jpeg)

### DINNER PARTIES

If you need to feed a group of hungry colleagues for lunch in a hurry, talk to us about pre-ordering. It's stress-free and inexpensive.

Otherwise, we can cater a sit-down lunch or dinner for up to 120 guests with a wide assortment of menus.

![Image 4: Corporate Gatherings](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_60a0917398054a7ab43aae0ce489e1df~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_74,y_0,w_163,h_163/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/28518312-839F-409C-BB2D-9F994D04E61A_4_5005_c.jpeg)

### Corporate

Whether you're organising a meeting, a symposium, a company, a dinner, or cocktail party, we'll help you get it right.

When you need to set up an industry networking gathering or nail a presentation to a large group of potential clients: let us assist you in fine-tuning it and hitting the right note.

### Function Enquiry Form

![Image 5: Fresh Yumbah Mussels](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_962a8024b6a54993940d5394e8812676~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_412,h_296,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/FreshMussels.png)

[![Image 6: Yumbah Aquiculture is the best](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_87376b93bc7c4b81904276730688cdb2~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_159,h_159,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Yumbah.jpg)](https://yumbah.com/company/locations/)

Belgian Beer Café is proud to partner with [Yumbah Sea Farms](https://yumbah.com/company/locations/) to deliver the highest quality mussels to our guests.

![Image 7: Stella is an awesome Belgian Beer](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_f93a7f25067f44db82afefab7442328e~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_412,h_296,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Stella_Promo_edited.jpg)

## Location & Hours

Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne

is located at 5 Riverside Quay, Southbank, Melbourne.

We are open every day from

12pm until late. Come and visit us for lunch, dinner, or drinks.

Follow us on [Untappd](https://untappd.com/v/belgian-beer-cafe

![Image 2: Friendly get togethers](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_bebf171022ca4d33aa3fc0ea2e17b178~mv2.jpg/v1/crop/x_171,y_0,w_683,h_683/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/64A49FDC-D7EF-4C9C-A48C-1AE15BF7E5E2_edi.jpg)

### COCKTAIL PARTY

Whether you have in mind a cocktail soirée with a completely customisable menu of delectable canapés or an open tab session with a variety of delicious finger-food platters, we can cater for up to 300 people and suit every occasion.

![Image 3: Corporate lunches or Dinners](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_f2751d8304cb4678aeb5ab64fe14a3bb~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_420,y_0,w_1080,h_1080/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/F6DACF4E-DF2C-4F91-AB67-BC7324A72849.jpeg)

### DINNER PARTIES

If you need to feed a group of hungry colleagues for lunch in a hurry, talk to us about pre-ordering. It's stress-free and inexpensive.

Otherwise, we can cater a sit-down lunch or dinner for up to 120 guests with a wide assortment of menus.

![Image 4: Corporate Gatherings](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_60a0917398054a7ab43aae0ce489e1df~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_74,y_0,w_163,h_163/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/28518312-839F-409C-BB2D-9F994D04E61A_4_5005_c.jpeg)

### Corporate

Whether you're organising a meeting, a symposium, a company, a dinner, or cocktail party, we'll help you get it right.

When you need to set up an industry networking gathering or nail a presentation to a large group of potential clients: let us assist you in fine-tuning it and hitting the right note.

### Function Enquiry Form

![Image 5: Fresh Yumbah Mussels](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_962a8024b6a54993940d5394e8812676~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_412,h_296,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/FreshMussels.png)

[![Image 6: Yumbah Aquiculture is the best](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_87376b93bc7c4b81904276730688cdb2~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_159,h_159,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Yumbah.jpg)](https://yumbah.com/company/locations/)

Belgian Beer Café is proud to partner with [Yumbah Sea Farms](https://yumbah.com/company/locations/) to deliver the highest quality mussels to our guests.

![Image 7: Stella is an awesome Belgian Beer](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_f93a7f25067f44db82afefab7442328e~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_412,h_296,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Stella_Promo_edited.jpg)

Markdown Content:
## Welcome to Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne

At Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne - a family-owned and operated business - we pride ourselves on offering an extensive selection of beers from around the world. Our tap beer and bottle menu includes classic Belgian styles like Trappist, Dubbels, Tripels, and Saisons, as well as local and other international brews. We also serve an excellent selection of wines and cocktails, so there is definitely something for everyone. Come in for lunch, dinner, or just drinks. We're open 7 days a week.

Happenings

Functions / Events

## FUNCTIONS & EVENTS

Turn Event Stress into Event Success

![Image 1: Beer with friends](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_d1a4d1b0ab554de7ba2e5e9a3579c012~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_132,y_0,w_336,h_336/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/100BB2FF-703F-40A2-B3E8-52395DA69654_4_5005_c.jpeg)

### GATHERINGS

A birthday party? A going-away party? A promotion party? A large family gathering?Need a dedicated area? Need food and drinks? We can do it all!

![Image 2: Friendly get togethers](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_bebf171022ca4d33aa3fc0ea2e17b178~mv2.jpg/v1/crop/x_171,y_0,w_683,h_683/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/64A49FDC-D7EF-4C9C-A48C-1AE15BF7E5E2_edi.jpg)

### COCKTAIL PARTY

Whether you have in mind a cocktail soirée with a completely customisable menu of delectable canapés or an open tab session with a variety of delicious finger-food platters, we can cater for up to 300 people and suit every occasion.

![Image 3: Corporate lunches or Dinners](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_f2751d8304cb4678aeb5ab64fe14a3bb~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_420,y_0,w_1080,h_1080/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/F6DACF4E-DF2C-4F91-AB67-BC7324A72849.jpeg)

### DINNER PARTIES

If you need to feed a group of hungry colleagues for lunch in a hurry, talk to us about pre-ordering. It's stress-free and inexpensive.

Otherwise, we can cater a sit-down lunch or dinner for up to 120 guests with a wide assortment of menus.

![Image 4: Corporate Gatherings](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_60a0917398054a7ab43aae0ce489e1df~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_74,y_0,w_163,h_163/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/28518312-839F-409C-BB2D-9F994D04E61A_4_5005_c.jpeg)

### Corporate

Whether you're organising a meeting, a symposium, a company, a dinner, or cocktail party, we'll help you get it right.

When you need to set up an industry networking gathering or nail a presentation to a large group of potential clients: let us assist you in fine-tuning it and hitting the right note.

### Function Enquiry Form

![Image 5: Fresh Yumbah Mussels](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_962a8024b6a54993940d5394e8812676~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_412,h_296,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/FreshMussels.png)

[![Image 6: Yumbah Aquiculture is the best](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_87376b93bc7c4b81904276730688cdb2~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_159,h_159,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Yumbah.jpg)](https://yumbah.com/company/locations/)

Belgian Beer Café is proud to partner with [Yumbah Sea Farms](https://yumbah.com/company/locations/) to deliver the highest quality mussels to our guests.

![Image 7: Stella is an awesome Belgian Beer](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_f93a7f25067f44db82afefab7442328e~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_412,h_296,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Stella_Promo_edited.jpg)

## Location & Hours

Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne

is located at 5 Riverside Quay, Southbank, Melbourne.

We are open every day from

12pm until late. Come and visit us for lunch, dinner, or drinks.

Follow us on [Untappd](https://untappd.com/v/belgian-beer-cafe

Title: Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne | Belgian Beer in Melbourne | 5 Riverside Quay, Southbank VIC, Australia

Markdown Content:
## Welcome to Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne

At Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne - a family-owned and operated business - we pride ourselves on offering an extensive selection of beers from around the world. Our tap beer and bottle menu includes classic Belgian styles like Trappist, Dubbels, Tripels, and Saisons, as well as local and other international brews. We also serve an excellent selection of wines and cocktails, so there is definitely something for everyone. Come in for lunch, dinner, or just drinks. We're open 7 days a week.

Happenings

Functions / Events

## FUNCTIONS & EVENTS

Turn Event Stress into Event Success

![Image 1: Beer with friends](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_d1a4d1b0ab554de7ba2e5e9a3579c012~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_132,y_0,w_336,h_336/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/100BB2FF-703F-40A2-B3E8-52395DA69654_4_5005_c.jpeg)

### GATHERINGS

A birthday party? A going-away party? A promotion party? A large family gathering?Need a dedicated area? Need food and drinks? We can do it all!

![Image 2: Friendly get togethers](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_bebf171022ca4d33aa3fc0ea2e17b178~mv2.jpg/v1/crop/x_171,y_0,w_683,h_683/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/64A49FDC-D7EF-4C9C-A48C-1AE15BF7E5E2_edi.jpg)

### COCKTAIL PARTY

Whether you have in mind a cocktail soirée with a completely customisable menu of delectable canapés or an open tab session with a variety of delicious finger-food platters, we can cater for up to 300 people and suit every occasion.

![Image 3: Corporate lunches or Dinners](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_f2751d8304cb4678aeb5ab64fe14a3bb~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_420,y_0,w_1080,h_1080/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/F6DACF4E-DF2C-4F91-AB67-BC7324A72849.jpeg)

### DINNER PARTIES

If you need to feed a group of hungry colleagues for lunch in a hurry, talk to us about pre-ordering. It's stress-free and inexpensive.

Otherwise, we can cater a sit-down lunch or dinner for up to 120 guests with a wide assortment of menus.

![Image 4: Corporate Gatherings](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_60a0917398054a7ab43aae0ce489e1df~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_74,y_0,w_163,h_163/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/28518312-839F-409C-BB2D-9F994D04E61A_4_5005_c.jpeg)

### Corporate

Whether you're organising a meeting, a symposium, a company, a dinner, or cocktail party, we'll help you get it right.

When you need to set up an industry networking gathering or nail a presentation to a large group of potential clients: let us assist you in fine-tuning it and hitting the right note.

### Function Enquiry Form

![Image 5: Fresh Yumbah Mussels](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_962a8024b6a54993940d5394e8812676~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_412,h_296,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/FreshMussels.png)

[![Image 6: Yumbah Aquiculture is the best](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_87376b93bc7c4b81904276730688cdb2~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_159,h_159,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Yumbah.jpg)](https://yumbah.com/company/locations/)

Belgian Beer Café is proud to partner with [Yumbah Sea Farms](https://yumbah.com/company/locations/) to deliver the highest quality mussels to our guests.

![Image 7: Stella is an awesome Belgian Beer](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_f93a7f25067f44db82afefab7442328e~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_412,h_296,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Stella_Promo_edited.jpg)

Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne

is located at 5 Riverside Quay, Southbank, Melbourne.

We are open every day from

[![Image 1: Donor Tissue Bank of Victoria (DTBV)](https://dtbv.org.au/wp-content/themes/dtbv-bootstrap/img/dtbv-logo-nav.png)](https://dtbv.org.au/ "Donor Tissue Bank of Victoria (DTBV)")

[![Image 3](https://dtbv.org.au/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Homepage-Banner-4-1040x300.png)](https://dtbv.org.au/donatelife-week-2025-27-july-to-3-august-2025/)

### Learn more

## How Can I Donate Skin?

In Australia, skin can only be donated from deceased donors.

You can register your wish to be a tissue donor in Australia on the DonateLife website: [www.donatelife.gov.au](http://www.donatelife.gov.au/).

It is also important to tell your family members your wishes as they will be asked to help facilitate donation at that time

## Become a Donor

[![Image 4: DTBV](https://dtbv.org.au/wp-content/uploads/2013/12/shutterstock_161208692-cropped-sml-LAPTOP.jpg)](https://dtbv.org.au/discover/how-do-i-become-a-donor/)

Find out how you can register your wish to be considered for tissue donation...

## About Tissue Donation

[![Image 5: DTBV](https://dtbv.org.au/wp-content/uploads/2013/12/shutterstock_162629372-Cropped-sml-BABY.jpg)](https://dtbv.org.au/discover/)

Tissue donation can enhance and even save people's lives. Find out more...

## Reasons to Donate

[![Image 6: DTBV](https://dtbv.org.au/wp-content/uploads/2013/12/shutterstock_162697553-cropped-sml-GRANNY.jpg)](https://dtbv.org.au/discover/why-donate/)

There are many reasons to become a tissue donor. Find out more...

messages.content:
Title: Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne | Belgian Beer in Melbourne | 5 Riverside Quay, Southbank VIC, Australia

URL Source: http://www.belgianbeercafemelbourne.com.au/

Markdown Content:
## Welcome to Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne

At Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne - a family-owned and operated business - we pride ourselves on offering an extensive selection of beers from around the world. Our tap beer and bottle menu includes classic Belgian styles like Trappist, Dubbels, Tripels, and Saisons, as well as local and other international brews. We also serve an excellent selection of wines and cocktails, so there is definitely something for everyone. Come in for lunch, dinner, or just drinks. We're open 7 days a week.

Happenings

Functions / Events

## FUNCTIONS & EVENTS

Turn Event Stress into Event Success

![Image 1: Beer with friends](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_d1a4d1b0ab554de7ba2e5e9a3579c012~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_132,y_0,w_336,h_336/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/100BB2FF-703F-40A2-B3E8-52395DA69654_4_5005_c.jpeg)

### GATHERINGS

A birthday party? A going-away party? A promotion party? A large family gathering?Need a dedicated area? Need food and drinks? We can do it all!

![Image 2: Friendly get togethers](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_bebf171022ca4d33aa3fc0ea2e17b178~mv2.jpg/v1/crop/x_171,y_0,w_683,h_683/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/64A49FDC-D7EF-4C9C-A48C-1AE15BF7E5E2_edi.jpg)

### COCKTAIL PARTY

Whether you have in mind a cocktail soirée with a completely customisable menu of delectable canapés or an open tab session with a variety of delicious finger-food platters, we can cater for up to 300 people and suit every occasion.

![Image 3: Corporate lunches or Dinners](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_f2751d8304cb4678aeb5ab64fe14a3bb~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_420,y_0,w_1080,h_1080/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/F6DACF4E-DF2C-4F91-AB67-BC7324A72849.jpeg)

### DINNER PARTIES

If you need to feed a group of hungry colleagues for lunch in a hurry, talk to us about pre-ordering. It's stress-free and inexpensive.

Otherwise, we can cater a sit-down lunch or dinner for up to 120 guests with a wide assortment of menus.

![Image 4: Corporate Gatherings](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_60a0917398054a7ab43aae0ce489e1df~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_74,y_0,w_163,h_163/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/28518312-839F-409C-BB2D-9F994D04E61A_4_5005_c.jpeg)

### Corporate

Whether you're organising a meeting, a symposium, a company, a dinner, or cocktail party, we'll help you get it right.

When you need to set up an industry networking gathering or nail a presentation to a large group of potential clients: let us assist you in fine-tuning it and hitting the right note.

### Function Enquiry Form

![Image 5: Fresh Yumbah Mussels](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_962a8024b6a54993940d5394e8812676~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_412,h_296,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/FreshMussels.png)

[![Image 6: Yumbah Aquiculture is the best](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_87376b93bc7c4b81904276730688cdb2~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_159,h_159,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Yumbah.jpg)](https://yumbah.com/company/locations/)

Belgian Beer Café is proud to partner with [Yumbah Sea Farms](https://yumbah.com/company/locations/) to deliver the highest quality mussels to our guests.

![Image 7: Stella is an awesome Belgian Beer](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_f93a7f25067f44db82afefab7442328e~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_412,h_296,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Stella_Promo_edited.jpg)

## Location & Hours

Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne

is located at 5 Riverside Quay, Southbank, Melbourne.

We are open every day from

12pm until late. Come and visit us for lunch, dinner, or drinks.

Follow us on [Untappd](https://untappd.com/v/belgian-beer-cafe

messages.content:
Title: Welcome to DTBV - Donor Tissue Bank of Victoria (DTBV)

URL Source: https://www.dtbv.org.au/

Markdown Content:
[![Image 1: Donor Tissue Bank of Victoria (DTBV)](https://dtbv.org.au/wp-content/themes/dtbv-bootstrap/img/dtbv-logo-nav.png)](https://dtbv.org.au/ "Donor Tissue Bank of Victoria (DTBV)")

*   [Home](https://dtbv.org.au/)
*   [About](https://dtbv.org.au/about/)
*   [Discover](https://dtbv.org.au/discover/)
*   [For Medical Practitioners](https://dtbv.org.au/dtbv-tissue-grafts/)
*   [News & Events](https://dtbv.org.au/news-events/)
*   [Contact us](https://dtbv.org.au/contact-us/)

![Image 2: Donor Tissue Bank of Victoria (DTBV)](https://dtbv.org.au/wp-content/themes/dtbv-bootstrap/img/dtbv-logo.png)

[![Image 3](https://dtbv.org.au/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Homepage-Banner-4-1040x300.png)](https://dtbv.org.au/donatelife-week-2025-27-july-to-3-august-2025/)

### Learn more

## How Can I Donate Skin?

In Australia, skin can only be donated from deceased donors.

You can register your wish to be a tissue donor in Australia on the DonateLife website: [www.donatelife.gov.au](http://www.donatelife.gov.au/).

It is also important to tell your family members your wishes as they will be asked to help facilitate donation at that time

## Become a Donor

[![Image 4: DTBV](https://dtbv.org.au/wp-content/uploads/2013/12/shutterstock_161208692-cropped-sml-LAPTOP.jpg)](https://dtbv.org.au/discover/how-do-i-become-a-donor/)

Find out how you can register your wish to be considered for tissue donation...

## About Tissue Donation

[![Image 5: DTBV](https://dtbv.org.au/wp-content/uploads/2013/12/shutterstock_162629372-Cropped-sml-BABY.jpg)](https://dtbv.org.au/discover/)

Tissue donation can enhance and even save people's lives. Find out more...

## Reasons to Donate

[![Image 6: DTBV](https://dtbv.org.au/wp-content/uploads/2013/12/shutterstock_162697553-cropped-sml-GRANNY.jpg)](https://dtbv.org.au/discover/why-donate/)

There are many reasons to become a tissue donor. Find out more...
